title: Delta's better vanilla
description: A simple vanilla+ modpack with improved fps and minimal blocks and items added
body:
**delta's better vanilla - Enhanced minecraft Experience**
Get ready for a smooth, immersive, and social Vanilla Minecraft experience with our Vanilla+ modpack!

This pack focuses on enhancing your gameplay without adding any new blocks or items. We've carefully selected mods to:

Boost your FPS: Say goodbye to lag and enjoy silky smooth gameplay with optimized performance.
Immerse yourself with stunning visuals: Experience the beauty of Minecraft in a whole new light with breathtaking shaders such as photon or bliss.
Connect with friends: Enjoy seamless voice chat with your fellow players, making communication and collaboration a breeze through the simple voice chat mod.

**delta's better vanilla is perfect for:**

Players seeking a polished, high-performance Vanilla experience.
Groups of friends wanting to enhance their multiplayer sessions.
Anyone who enjoys the core mechanics of Minecraft but wants to push the visual and performance boundaries.
Join our server and experience Vanilla Minecraft like never before!
